diagrams.title: Wrapper Class Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the inheritance hierarchy of Java wrapper classes from Object and Number
diagrams.purpose: Understand the relationship between wrapper classes and their common parent classes for polymorphism

diagrams.title: Autoboxing and Unboxing Process
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing how primitives and wrapper objects convert to each other
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the automatic conversions performed by Java compiler between primitives and wrappers

diagrams.title: Integer Caching Mechanism
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how Integer objects are cached for values -128 to 127
elements: Inside range: Returns cached reference (same object)
Outside range: Creates new object each time
new Integer() always creates new object
diagrams.purpose: Explain why == behaves differently for Integer objects based on value ranges
